Thanks for contributing to metatrader5-cli!
Keep this PR focused on a single change. Fill in the sections below and
check off the items in the checklist before requesting review.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? Keep it concise. -->

## Linked issue

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123". If there is no issue, briefly explain the motivation. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Unit tests pass: `pytest -m "not integration"`
- [ ] Lint is clean: `ruff check .`
- [ ] New behavior is covered by a test
- [ ] Any new error codes are registered in `mt5_cli/errors.py`
- [ ] Docs are updated if needed
- [ ] No live-account credentials or other internal data are included in the diff
